name: multi-organ complex support
description: the food your dog eats plays an important role in their overall health and well-being. multi-organ is formulated with optimal levels of protein and minerals to help protect vital kidney and heart function in dogs with multiple health issues. clinical nutrition designed to help support vital organs including kidneys, pancreas, heart, liver, and the bladder nutrition formulated with 43% less fat than hill's prescription diet k/d with chicken dry dog food activbiome+ kidney defense activates the gut microbiome to reduce harmful waste products
